TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Leung Chun-ying ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Leung Chun-ying, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Hong kong ta' misuw hya' ga Leung Chun-ying, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: leuŇč ¶~ ®ńßun-jiŇč rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, leuŇč ¶~ ®ńßun-jiŇč, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ńßoŇč koŇč ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a leuŇč ¶~ ®ńßun-jiŇč, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Leung Chun-ying ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Leung Chun-ying, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Hong kong ta' misuw hya' ga Leung Chun-ying, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
